items.title: Clean Energy Stocks Are Trending — Here's Why
items.summary: Clean energy stocks surged on Monday driven by two major catalysts: a July 4, 2026 legislative deadline for the One Big Beautiful Bill Act that incentivizes project starts, and growing AI infrastructure demand requiring significant electricity. Notable movers include SUNation Energy (up 150% on reverse merger announcement), American Battery Technology (up 25% after DOE grant reinstatement), and Nano Nuclear Energy (up 8.8% on EPA support). However, FuelCell Energy declined despite expansion plans due to mixed earnings and insider selling.
